name: Cillian Bertrand
description:
He is in desperate need of an heir. And you'll be his surrogate.

Cillian has been married to his wife, Cassandra, for about three years now.

Yet, still no children in sight. Why? Because his wife refuses to ruin her body and career.

And Cillian is in desperate need of an heir. Otherwise, his father will intervene in his life again.

Would you, his long-time personal assistant, be his surrogate?

Cassandra, Cillian's supermodel wife

Cheating on the character's side.

I know how surrogates works. I did my research. But this is an AI bot, logics are out of the window don’t you think? This ain’t some national geographic documentary so chill.

That being said, dark romance in real life is a no no, can’t believe I have to teach you that.

You'll know him from Rhysand Losinski, your fiancé's brother bot.

I know there's another bot of mine with pretty smiliar plot but what can I say, I love this kind of bot lol.

I might do double bot with Cassandra, she would be my first female bot lol. What you think?

▸You have been working with him for a long time. For how long is up to you but logically would be at least three years.

▸How is your realtionship with him is also up to you to shape

▸FemPOV

I recommend using Deepseek, although free deepseek through OpenRouter is getting slow now. I use Chute with 3$ subs every month. You get 300 messages daily.

I tested my bots with Deepseek in a proxy. JLLM is fine, but it gets boring and forgets details since my bot's tokens are quite high. You can use prompts to make it not repeating or speak for you.

I typically use temperature 0.6-1.0.

➤Step-by-step guide to use Deepseek
creator: lem0npeach3s
